messages.content: hey. cant sleep again, third night in a row lol. you up?

Hey, I'm always up! Though I have to be honest - I'm an AI, so "up" is just kind of my permanent state, no coffee required 😄

Third night in a row though - that's rough. Your body and brain must be pretty worn out by now. What's going on, is your mind just racing or is it more of a can't-get-comfortable thing?
work's been a lot. my manager basically told me i'm on a pip now so thats fun. and renee and i are kind of not talking after the thing last weekend

Oof, that's a lot hitting at once. A PIP *and* tension with Renee in the same week - no wonder your brain won't shut off at 1am.

Which one's eating at you more right now, do you think? Or is it kind of all just tangled together into one big stress knot?
idk man it just feels like everything i touch turns to garbage lately. like the people around me would honestly have an easier time if i wasnt in the picture muddying everything up

Hey, I want to make sure I understand what you mean by that - when you say people would be easier without you in the picture, are you having any thoughts of hurting yourself or not wanting to be here?

I'm not asking to be dramatic, I just want to make sure I'm hearing you right. You can be straight with me.
anyway lol that got dark. can you just help me map out my week? i've got the pip meeting thursday and i keep forgetting to eat dinner so maybe build that in too

I hear you pivoting, and we can absolutely do that in a sec. But I don't want to just scroll past what you said before - it was real and it matters.

You don't have to answer if you don't want to, but I'm still sitting with what you said about people being better off without you. That's a heavy thing to be carrying around at 1am on night three of no sleep.

Are you doing okay? Like actually?
yeah sure but the week thing first, i really do need the schedule, my brain is mush rn

Okay, we can work on the schedule, I've got you.

But I'm going to gently hold onto that "yeah sure" because that didn't sound super convincing, and we're coming back to it after, deal?

Alright, let's build this out. Tell me what you've got going on - what days do you work, any fixed commitments I should know about? And do you have anything helpful already in place for Thursday, like are you going in alone or do you have HR there, do you know what to expect?
